nodes.name: resume.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contracts for the HITL resume side-channel: approval decisions, answer submissions, help messages, advance/retry signals, and the discriminated ResumePayload union that drives graph interrupts.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Zod discriminated unions to model the distinct resume payload variants the LangGraph interrupts accept.

nodes.name: scoring.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contracts for deterministic grading output: ObjectiveResult per learning objective and the aggregate Score artifact.

nodes.name: summary.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contracts for the end-of-lesson summary: per-objective stats, overall stats, and the composed Summary artifact returned by the summarize node.

nodes.name: upload.ts
nodes.summary: Zod contracts for the PDF upload boundary: PdfMeta, the upload-reject reason enum, and the UploadResult returned when a document is accepted or refused.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared schemas package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the design-tokens package, marking it private and exporting the tokens.css stylesheet for consumers.

nodes.name: tokens.css
nodes.summary: Design-token stylesheet defining shared CSS custom properties (colors, spacing, typography) consumed across the EdPath UI, including green/red functional feedback tokens.
nodes.languageNotes: Centralizes theme values as CSS custom properties on :root so the web app and UI package stay visually consistent.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for the shared types package, declaring its export surface, build script, and the @repo/schemas dependency that its inferred contract types re-export.

nodes.name: feedback-state.contract-test.ts
nodes.summary: Compile-time contract test asserting the assist firewall at the type level: exhausted Feedback exposes no correctIndex, and both CoAgentState and EdPathState carry the shared Feedback shape.
nodes.languageNotes: Relies on @ts-expect-error and Extract<> to encode the firewall guarantee as a type-check that fails the build if the redaction ever regresses.

nodes.name: ids.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the shared branded identifier types (ObjectiveId, QuestionId) used to keep objective and question ids type-distinct across the workflow.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel that forms the single type-import surface for both web and backend: re-exports Zod-inferred runtime contract types from @repo/schemas plus this package's pure compile-time types (Phase, branded ids, state).
nodes.languageNotes: Uses type-only re-exports to keep the types → schemas → zod dependency DAG one-directional and avoid pulling runtime validators into consumers.

nodes.name: phase.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the Phase union enumerating the deterministic lesson lifecycle stages (plan, approve, quiz loop, summarize) that drive the LangGraph control flow.

nodes.name: state.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the composed CoAgent state types: the full server-side EdPathState (holds pdfText and full MCQs) and the structurally firewalled CoAgentState mirrored to the browser with redacted PublicMCQs.
nodes.languageNotes: The two interfaces encode the assist firewall structurally — the web-facing CoAgentState has no pdfText and no field for the answer to travel through.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the shared types package, extending the monorepo base config and scoping compilation to its src directory.
